svg.text: Multi-Agent Operating System — System Architecture & Data Flow
Agent Fleet · Task Board · KG Viz
Learn from every execution — agents get smarter over time
Auto-skill creation: error probability drops 90%+ after 100 runs
Teach one agent = teach all agents
Agent execution: build system prompt → stream response
Every run → auto-record to Evolution Engine
🟡 Attempt 2 → Same Error → Switch model → Retry
⚪ All failed → Notify human + Expert ticket
Budget Management · Smart Model Routing · Cost Optimization — spans all layers

rect.text: Monthly budget tracking · Task→Model classification · Auto-downgrade when budget low · Transaction audit log

svg.text: Each layer also feeds into Knowledge Graph (L4) for learning, Evolution Engine for skill refinement, and Token Economy for cost tracking
